title: Lab 45: Restore Default SELinux Context
description: Restore the default SELinux context for a web file on server and keep httpd enforcing.

tasks: On server, the file /var/www/html/index45.html has the wrong SELinux context. Restore the default context.
Ensure the httpd service is enabled and running on server. SELinux must remain enforcing.
hints: Use the default file-context policy instead of a custom override.
This lab now runs on server.
checks: # server getenforce | grep -qx Enforcing && systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active
solution_outline: Restore the default context for index45.html.
Enable and start httpd while keeping SELinux enforcing.
task_titles: Restore the default context on server
Enable httpd on server with SELinux enforcing
